project.name: Project Constellation
project.summary: Platform migration is 85% complete. Core services have been fully migrated; remaining work involves telemetry integration and partner SDK updates. No blocking issues at this time.

workItems.title: Identity service migration
workItems.description: Migrated identity service to new platform with zero downtime.

workItems.title: Data pipeline v2 deployment
workItems.description: Deployed new data pipeline with 3x throughput improvement.

workItems.title: API gateway configuration
workItems.description: Configured API gateway routing for all migrated services.

workItems.title: Load testing baseline
workItems.description: Established performance baselines for migrated services.

workItems.title: Telemetry SDK integration
workItems.description: Integrating new telemetry SDK across all platform services.

workItems.title: Dashboard metrics rollout
workItems.description: Building executive metrics dashboard with real-time data.

workItems.title: Alert rule migration
workItems.description: Migrating existing alert rules to new monitoring platform.

workItems.title: Partner onboarding docs
workItems.description: Documentation for partner SDK integration delayed by scope change.
